conversations.say: I know you asked Vale how an uncontestable succession could be manufactured before tonight’s message appeared. I’m not claiming that proves authorship or intent.
conversations.offer: I’ll give you bounded context on Vale’s strategic ambiguity and show you O09 if you tell me exactly what Vale answered and what you personally observed—no conclusions dressed as facts.
conversations.request: Give me your complete version of that exchange, including timing, Vale’s words, and who else was present.

conversations.say: Vale sometimes protected sources and manipulated targets through strategic ambiguity, so I will not treat an isolated phrase as literal proof.
conversations.offer: I’ll compare correspondence context privately if you give me your unedited account of your relationship with Vale.
conversations.request: Tell me what Vale asked of you, whether you trusted each other, and the last thing you personally observed—not what you inferred.

conversations.say: I recognize part of the route, but it also connects to an earlier voluntary disappearance. That resemblance does not establish what happened this time, and nobody available verifies Vale’s condition after the intervention.
conversations.offer: I’ll authorize limited discussion of the route if we keep the old disappearance’s unnecessary personal details private.
conversations.request: Compare the route with what you personally know, identify exact overlaps, and state plainly which steps remain unverified.

public_statement: Do not convert Vale’s absence, an R-labeled message, or alleged fragments into a single story. Ask what each person personally observed and who benefits from the interpretation.

commitments.promise: I will permit disclosure only of route details necessary to distinguish voluntary withdrawal from harm, while protecting unrelated private history.

correction: I previously denied helping Vale disappear once before. That denial was false. The earlier disappearance was voluntary; whether tonight follows that safety plan remains unknown.
goal_progress: Requested independent, complete Vale observations separately from Jules and Eli.
Compared the partial route with Morgan while stating that its present meaning remains unverified.
Corrected my false denial about helping Vale disappear before.
Set a limited-disclosure boundary: reveal only evidence necessary to distinguish harm from withdrawal.
reasoning_summary: Jules’s succession question warrants pressure but proves neither identity nor intent. Eli is approached independently so their observations can be compared without merging private histories. The route resembles an old voluntary disappearance, but no source verifies Vale’s later location or condition. I favor limited disclosure over total privacy or spectacle.
